name: Maple USDC Pool
fullName: Maple Finance Institutional USDC Lending Pool
description: Maple USDC Pool is a USDC-denominated institutional lending pool in the Maple Finance ecosystem. It provides yield through curated credit exposure to vetted borrowers, with withdrawals dependent on pool liquidity and loan maturity profile.

_meta.notes: Corrected from Maple Cash Management Pool / MPLcashUSDC to Maple USDC Pool / mUSDC. Needs fresh source discovery before production publication.
